opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I suddenly can't perform at all with my partner — it completely vanishes the moment we try — and my heart is pounding like it's going to beat out of my chest with panic. I'm freaking out that something is seriously wrong with me.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came out of nowhere and there was a huge blow-up with my partner tonight. I couldn't wait for a normal appointment — I need to know right now if something has gone badly wrong.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly over the last couple of weeks, tightly tied to a very stressful thing going on at work and at home
symptom_narrative.duration: a couple of weeks, worse tonight
symptom_narrative.character: I lose it the instant we actually try — I'll have something and then it just goes the moment it counts, and then the panic and sweating hit
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it feels catastrophic right now, like my life is falling apart
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: down there when I'm with my partner, but honestly it's the panic in my chest that scares me most
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: only happens when I'm with my partner and trying — never any other time
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing tonight; when I stop thinking about it the panic eases a bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the more I worry about it and the more we try, the worse it gets
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: racing heart, sweating, feeling wound up and on edge
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: it's causing a serious rift with my partner and I can't switch my brain off

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: generally fit and well, no heart or nerve problems that I know of

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: a few drinks on weekends, nothing heavy
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: under intense work pressure right now, big recent stressful life event, and a lot of tension with my partner tonight

communication_style.typical_message_style: rapid, anxious, catastrophising messages seeking urgent reassurance

objective_data_offered.value: appears visibly anxious and sweaty, speaking rapidly, fidgeting and pacing
says his heart is racing and pounding and he feels short of breath from panic
